sourceMovie.title: Grown Ups 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Grown Ups 2 (2013) as a comedy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Back to the Future
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Grown Ups 2 clicked for you, Back to the Future (1985) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Grown Ups 2?
faq.answer: Try Back to the Future, Toy Story, Back to the Future Part II—each shares DNA with Grown Ups 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Grown Ups 2?
faq.answer: Grown Ups 2 (2013) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Grown Ups 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Grown Ups Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
